title: Red Feathers
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Red Feathers''''' was a crippled [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Super Transport VI]], which had crashed on [[Blood Nest]], orbiting the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Blood Nest|M2398-3]]. This ship was used as the headquarters for a band of pirates under name '''''Blood Nest''''' until their [[Battle of M2398-3|defeat]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] by [[Wraith Squadron]]. It was then used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in the [[Battle of Ession]] to deliver three [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadrons and the [[Katarn Commandos|Page's commandos]]. The commandos activated its self-destruct and left the ship in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]], while [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]], [[Blue Squadron (New Republic)|Blue]], and [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadrons]] were released from the ship's hangar when the self-destruct charges broke apart its hull.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
